meanings.definition: the largest city in Montana; located in southern Montana on the Yellowstone river
request for payment of a debt
examples: they submitted their charges at the end of each month
Will I get charged for this service?
We were billed for 4 nights in the hotel, although we stayed only 3 nights

meanings.definition: advertise especially by posters or placards
examples: He was billed as the greatest tenor since Caruso
